title: Oracle Agrees to Buy Power From Bloom for AI Data Centers
description: Oracle Corp. agreed to purchase as much as 2.8 gigawatts of fuel-cell power from Bloom Energy Corp. to supply data centers for artificial intelligence work.

title: Aon CEO: Pursuing 'Tremendous' AI Opportunity
description: Aon CEO Greg case discusses managing risk in times of geopolitical volatility, and why AI opportunities aren't limited to 'just the hyperscalers.' He talks with Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Microsoft Raises Surface Prices Sharply in Face of Memory Crunch
description: Microsoft Corp. raised prices sharply across its Surface-branded device lineup, becoming the latest personal computer maker to pass along costs fueled by a historic memory chip shortage.
